note: Full information_schema.columns dump for public schema. Paginated 4 batches of 200. Source: SELECT table_name, column_name, data_type, is_nullable, column_default FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema='public' ORDER BY table_name, ordinal_position. See raw output in audit transcript: 2026-05-05 Phase 0 audit.

key_tables_observed.highlights: tenant_id default 'dap_prime', anna_status, lead_score, lead_tier, scored_at, kommo_lead_id, brand_id, vehicle_info jsonb, multiple temporal+scoring fields. Multi-tenant + Anna integration baked in.
Manus enrichment dataset; 17887 rows. funnel_stage default 'lead_novo', score+classification+source. Probably read-only canonical lead lake.
Job queue: status default 'pending', attempts, external_event_id UNIQUE, kommo_lead_id, kommo_message_id, brand_id+tenant_id. Has rpc_anna_inbox_claim_next() function for SKIP LOCKED dispatch.
AI turn log with status_gate, escalation_reason, signals jsonb, confidence numeric, model+tokens. brand_id+tenant_id.
Multi-tenant brand+pipeline routing. temperature, intent, classification_confidence.
kommo_chat_id UNIQUE, last_temperature, last_intent.
Brand-to-Kommo mapping. brand_id UNIQUE, pipeline_id, prompt_file, rtbm_file, wa_number.
Workshop OS — empresa_id (multi-tenant via current_empresa_id() RLS function). final_cost, advance_payment, mecanico_id, consultor_id.
OS line items with cost, complexity, status.
Sennin Protocol C-Level (13 dirs)
Council deliberation chain — open/voice/synth/decide/archive. RAG integration via rag_collection.

key_tables_observed.table: parts + part_equivalents + compatible_vehicles + parts_price_records + parts_price_sources + parts_inventory + parts_price_alerts + parts_search_history
key_tables_observed.highlights: Odin Parts module — full parts intelligence. parts_inventory has user_id RLS. parts_price_sources is web-evidence backed pricing.
Enrichment output: pain_points, interests, segment_tags, decision_style, ltv_tier, funnel_stage, campaign_optout.
Background job queue for customer_profiles enrichment.
Meta WhatsApp Cloud API transport. meta_message_id UNIQUE, error_code/title, raw payload.
Generic webhook ingest log. 3979 rows.
Sofia agent action ledger. 239 rows. agent_name default 'sofia'.
Generic AI conversation framework (predates Anna naming). ai_api_keys has encrypted_key + provider UNIQUE.
RAG ingestion catalog. source_rag, collection_name, status.
Staff users. password_hash + auth_user_id + nivel_acesso_id. THIS is where the bcrypt+session legacy auth lives. username UNIQUE.
Multi-tenant root. 1 row (DAP).
Landing page leads with full UTM + gclid. Has create_campaign_lead() rpc and get_campaign_leads() function.
Client vehicles: placa, marca, modelo, versao, ano, vin, color.
Customer master: full_name, email, phone, cpf, tier, birthday, address.

naming_convention_warnings: Several PKs/indexes have legacy quoted numeric prefixes: "00_companies_pkey", "01_colaboradores_pkey", "04_CLIENTS_pkey", "05_VEHICLES_pkey", "06_OS_pkey", "07_OS_ITENS_pkey", "08_OS_HISTORICO_pkey", "12_MECANICOS_pkey", "13_PENDENCIAS_pkey", "14_RECURSOS_pkey", "15_AGENDAMENTOS_pkey", "97_RECUSAS_pkey". Reflect-tooling will choke on quoting. Plan to rename in Phase 2.
